```{r}
  theme(legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9), 
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/outcomes-transport-fj.png"),
       plot = transport_fj_fig,
       width = 18,
       height = 7,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/outcomes-transport-fj.png"))
```
```{r}
# Stacked
all_vars_fj_fig <- rbind(sociodemographics_fj, transport_fj) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(fill = FewJobs_Likert, y = fexp_final, x = Categories)) + 
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity") + 
  labs(x = NULL,
    y = "Population share",
    fill = "Few jobs available") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Sociodemographic, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3)  +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(legend.direction = "horizontal", legend.position = "bottom",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9), 
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/outcomes-allvars-fj.png"),
       plot = all_vars_fj_fig,
       width = 17,
       height = 16,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/outcomes-allvars-fj.png"))
```

## Easy to Reach

```{r}
# Sociodemographic groups
Indigenous_or_racialized_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>% 
  mutate(Sociodemographic = "Indigenous or Racialized", 
         Categories = Indigenous_or_racialized) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories))

LongTermConditions_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>% 
  mutate(Sociodemographic = "Long-term Conditions", 
         Categories = LongTermConditions) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories))

Temporary_or_refugee_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>% 
  mutate(Sociodemographic = "Temporary or Refugee", 
         Categories = Temporary_or_refugee) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories))

Woman_or_genderdiverse_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>% 
  mutate(Sociodemographic = "Woman or Gender Diverse", 
         Categories = Woman_or_genderdiverse) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories))

Age_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>% 
  mutate(Sociodemographic = "Age group", 
         Categories = age_group) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories))

Child_under_10_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>% 
  mutate(Child_under_10 = case_when(Child_under_10 > 2 ~ 951,
                   TRUE ~ Child_under_10), 
    Child_under_10 = factor(Child_under_10),
    Child_under_10 = case_when(Child_under_10 == "0" ~ "0",
                               Child_under_10 == "1" ~ "1",
                               Child_under_10 == "2" ~ "2",
                               Child_under_10 == "951" ~ "3 or more", 
                   TRUE ~ Child_under_10), 
    Child_under_10 = factor(Child_under_10, levels = c("0","1","2","3 or more"))) %>% 
  mutate(Sociodemographic = "Childs under 10", 
         Categories = Child_under_10) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories))

hh_income_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>% 
  mutate(Categories = case_when(
           hh_householdIncome == "000000_009999" ~ "<$30k",
           hh_householdIncome == "010000_019999" ~ "<$30k",
           hh_householdIncome == "020000_029999" ~ "<$30k",
           hh_householdIncome == "030000_039999" ~ "$30-$60k",
           hh_householdIncome == "040000_049999" ~ "$30-$60k",
           hh_householdIncome == "050000_059999" ~ "$30-$60k",
           hh_householdIncome == "060000_069999" ~ "$60-$90k",
           hh_householdIncome == "070000_079999" ~ "$60-$90k",
           hh_householdIncome == "080000_089999" ~ "$60-$90k",
           hh_householdIncome == "090000_119999" ~ "$90-$120k",
           hh_householdIncome == "120000_149999" ~ "$120-$150k",
           hh_householdIncome == "150000_179999" ~ "$150-$180k",
           hh_householdIncome == "180000_209999" ~ "$180-$210k",
           hh_householdIncome == "210000_999999" ~ ">$210k"),
         Categories = factor(Categories, levels = c("<$30k","$30-$60k","$60-$90k","$90-$120k","$120-$150k","$150-$180k","$180-$210k",">$210k")),
         Sociodemographic = "Income group") %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories))

hh_size_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>% 
  mutate(hh_size = case_when(hh_size > 4 ~ 951,
                   TRUE ~ hh_size), 
    hh_size = factor(hh_size),
    hh_size = case_when(hh_size == "0" ~ "0",
                               hh_size == "1" ~ "1",
                               hh_size == "2" ~ "2",
                               hh_size == "3" ~ "3",
                               hh_size == "4" ~ "4",
                               hh_size == "951" ~ "5+", 
                   TRUE ~ hh_size), 
    hh_size = factor(hh_size, levels = c("0","1","2","3","4","5+"))) %>% 
  mutate(Sociodemographic = "Household size", 
         Categories = hh_size) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories)) 

sociodemographics_etg <- rbind(Indigenous_or_racialized_etg, LongTermConditions_etg,
                               Temporary_or_refugee_etg, Woman_or_genderdiverse_etg,
                               Age_etg, hh_size_etg, hh_income_etg)


# Transport variables
CarNumber_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>% 
  mutate(CarNumber = case_when(CarNumber > 2 ~ 951,
                   TRUE ~ CarNumber), 
    CarNumber = factor(CarNumber),
    CarNumber = case_when(CarNumber == "0" ~ "0",
                               CarNumber == "1" ~ "1",
                               CarNumber == "2" ~ "2",
                               CarNumber == "951" ~ "3+", 
                   TRUE ~ CarNumber), 
    CarNumber = factor(CarNumber, levels = c("0","1","2","3+"))) %>% 
  mutate(Sociodemographic = "Number of cars", 
         Categories = CarNumber) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories)) 

BikeNumber_etg <- respondents %>% 
  filter(!is.na(EasyToGo_Likert)) %>%
    mutate(BikeNumber = case_when(BikeNumber > 2 ~ 951,
                   TRUE ~ BikeNumber), 
    BikeNumber = factor(BikeNumber),
    BikeNumber = case_when(BikeNumber == "0" ~ "0",
                               BikeNumber == "1" ~ "1",
                               BikeNumber == "2" ~ "2",
                               BikeNumber == "951" ~ "3+", 
                   TRUE ~ BikeNumber), 
    BikeNumber = factor(BikeNumber, levels = c("0","1","2","3+"))) %>% 
  mutate(Sociodemographic = "Number of bikes", 
         Categories = BikeNumber) %>% 
  dplyr::select(c(interview_id, fexp_final, EasyToGo_Likert, Sociodemographic, Categories)) 

transport_etg <- rbind(CarNumber_etg, BikeNumber_etg)
```

```{r}
# Sociodemographics plot
sociodemographics_etg_fig <- sociodemographics_etg %>% 
  ggplot(aes(fill = EasyToGo_Likert, y = fexp_final, x = Categories)) + 
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity") + 
  labs(x = "Sociodemographic",
       y = "Population share",
       fill = "Easy to reach: work") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Sociodemographic, scales = "free_x", ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(legend.direction = "horizontal", 
        legend.position = "bottom",    
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/outcomes-sociodemographics-etg.png"),
       plot = sociodemographics_etg_fig,
       width = 18, height = 12, units = "cm", dpi = 300)

# Transport plot
transport_etg_fig <- transport_etg %>% 
  ggplot(aes(fill = EasyToGo_Likert, y = fexp_final, x = Categories)) + 
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity", colour = NA) + 
  labs(x = "Transport variable",
       y = "Population share",
       fill = "Easy to reach: work") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Sociodemographic, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(legend.direction = "vertical",    
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/outcomes-transport-etg.png"),
       plot = transport_etg_fig,
       width = 18, height = 7, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/outcomes-sociodemographics-etg.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/outcomes-transport-etg.png"))
```

```{r}
# Stacked
all_vars_etg_fig <- rbind(sociodemographics_etg, transport_etg) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(fill = EasyToGo_Likert, y = fexp_final, x = Categories)) + 
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity") + 
  labs(x = NULL,
    y = "Population share",
    fill = "Easy to reach: Work") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Sociodemographic, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3)  +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(legend.direction = "horizontal", legend.position = "bottom",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9), 
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/outcomes-allvars-etg.png"),
       plot = all_vars_etg_fig,
       width = 17,
       height = 16,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/outcomes-allvars-etg.png"))
```

# Visualizing probabilities 

```{r}
## Most disadvantaged case
LongTermConditions_dis <- "Yes" 
Woman_or_genderdiverse_dis <- "No"
Indigenous_or_racialized_dis <- "Yes"
CarNumber_dis <- 0
BikeNumber_dis <- 0
hh_income_dis <- "Less than $30,000"
hh_size_dis <- 2
Temporary_or_refugee_dis <- "Yes"
Age_dis <- 35
Match_mode_dis <- "No"

disadvantaged <- paste0("LongTermConditions: ", LongTermConditions_dis ," - Woman_or_genderdiverse: ", Woman_or_genderdiverse_dis ," - Indigenous_or_racialized: ", Indigenous_or_racialized_dis ," - CarNumber: ", CarNumber_dis ," - BikeNumber: ", BikeNumber_dis ," - hh_income: ", hh_income_dis ," - hh_size: ",  hh_size_dis," - Temporary_or_refugee: ", Temporary_or_refugee_dis ," - Age: ", Age_dis," - Match_mode: ", Match_mode_dis ) 

disadvantaged
```


```{r}
predict_subset_linear_sig$Case[1]
```

```{r}
## Most non-disadvantaged case
LongTermConditions_ndis <- "No" 
Woman_or_genderdiverse_ndis <- "Yes"
Indigenous_or_racialized_ndis <- "No"
CarNumber_ndis <- 2
BikeNumber_ndis <- 1
hh_income_ndis <- "More than $210,000"
hh_size_ndis <- 2
Temporary_or_refugee_ndis <- "No"
Age_ndis <- 50
Match_mode_ndis <- "Yes"

non_disadvantaged <- paste0("LongTermConditions: ", LongTermConditions_ndis ," - Woman_or_genderdiverse: ", Woman_or_genderdiverse_ndis ," - Indigenous_or_racialized: ", Indigenous_or_racialized_ndis ," - CarNumber: ", CarNumber_ndis ," - BikeNumber: ", BikeNumber_ndis ," - hh_income: ", hh_income_ndis ," - hh_size: ",  hh_size_ndis," - Temporary_or_refugee: ", Temporary_or_refugee_ndis ," - Age: ", Age_ndis," - Match_mode: ", Match_mode_ndis ) 

non_disadvantaged
```

```{r}
accessibility_lines <- data.frame(Statistic = c("Median", "Maximum"),
  Value = c(Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5), 
            max(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, na.rm = TRUE)))

median_sa <- Hmisc::wtd.quantile(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, weights = respondents$fexp_final, probs = 0.5)
max_sa <- max(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_sa <- Hmisc::wtd.mean(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, weights = respondents$fexp_final)
```

## Linear cases 

```{r}
predict_subset_linear <- predict_subset %>% 
  filter(Model == "Linear")

signif_linear_models <- c("Few jobs accessible")

predict_subset_linear_sig  <- predict_subset_linear %>% 
  filter(Outcome %in% signif_linear_models)
```

### Equity concerns 

Transit: 

```{r}
predict_subset_standads_linear <- predict_subset_linear_sig %>% 
  filter(Mode == "Transit", 
         Case %in% c(disadvantaged, non_disadvantaged)) %>%  
    mutate(Outcome = factor(Outcome, levels = outcome_order_linear), 
           Equity = case_when(Case == disadvantaged ~ "Most Unsastisfied",
                              Case == non_disadvantaged ~ "Most Satisfied"))

probabilities_transit_linear <- predict_subset_standads_linear %>%   
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Outcome, fill = Outcome)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Probability - SE, ymax = Probability + SE), 
              alpha = 0.10, linetype = 0) +  
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = 97, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa,1)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = 97, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa,1)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    title = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100), 
                  xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max(respondents$SA_pp_Transit, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Equity, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/accessibility-effect-transit.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_transit_linear,
       width = 18,
       height = 7,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/accessibility-effect-transit.jpg"))
```


### Accessibility Effect 

Only significant cases: 

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_linear_sig$Case)){
  probabilities_sig <- predict_subset_linear_sig %>% 
  filter(Case == caso) %>% 
  mutate(Outcome = factor(Outcome, levels = outcome_order_linear)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Outcome, fill = Outcome)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Probability - SE, ymax = Probability + SE), 
              alpha = 0.15, linetype = 0) +  
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    title = str_wrap(caso, width = 70)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_linear) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_linear) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/linear/sig/", caso,"-linear-sig.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_sig,
       width = 18,
       height = 7,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/sig/", disadvantaged,"-linear-sig.jpg"))
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/linear/sig/", non_disadvantaged,"transit-linear-sig.jpg"))
```

## Ordinal cases 

```{r}
predict_subset_ordinal_fj <- predict_subset %>% 
  # filter(Model == "Ordinal", Outcome == "Few jobs accessible") %>% 
  filter(Model == "Ordinal", Outcome == "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal") %>%
mutate(Probability = Probability * 100)

predict_subset_ordinal_etr <- predict_subset %>% 
  filter(Model == "Ordinal", Outcome == "Easy to reach - Ordinal") %>% 
  mutate(Probability = Probability * 100)

# predict_subset_ordinal_de <- predict_subset %>% 
#   filter(Model == "Ordinal", Outcome == "Declined employment - Ordinal") %>% 
#   mutate(Probability = Probability * 100)
```

### Few jobs 

"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time" 

Just Transit: 

```{r}
predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj <- predict_subset %>%
  filter(Mode == "Transit", 
         Case %in% c(disadvantaged, non_disadvantaged), 
         Model == "Ordinal", 
         #Outcome == "Few jobs accessible"
         Outcome == "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal"
         ) %>%  
    mutate(Likert = factor(Likert, levels = Likert_order), 
           Equity = case_when(Case == disadvantaged ~ "Most Disadvantaged",
                              Case == non_disadvantaged ~ "Most Non-Disadvantaged"), 
           Probability = Probability * 100)

probabilities_transit_linear_fj <- predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj %>%   
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa,2)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa,2)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Few jobs available", 
    title = NULL) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100),
  #                 xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Equity, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-fj.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_transit_linear_fj,
       width = 18,
       height = 7,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-fj.jpg"))
```

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_ordinal_fj$Case)){
  probabilities_fj <- predict_subset_ordinal_fj %>% 
  filter(Case == caso) %>% 
  mutate(Likert = factor(Likert, levels = Likert_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Few jobs available", 
    title = str_wrap(caso, width = 80)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/ordinal/", caso,"-ordinal-fj.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_fj,
       width = 20,
       height = 8,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", disadvantaged,"-ordinal-fj.jpg"))
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", non_disadvantaged,"-ordinal-fj.jpg"))
```

### Easy to reach 

"With the transport options available to me, I can easily participate/reach the following destinations: Work" 

Just Transit: 

```{r}
predict_subset_standads_ordinal_etr <- predict_subset %>%
  filter(Mode == "Transit", 
         Case %in% c(disadvantaged, non_disadvantaged), 
         Model == "Ordinal", 
         Outcome == "Easy to reach - Ordinal"
         ) %>%  
    mutate(Likert = factor(Likert, levels = Likert_order), 
           Equity = case_when(Case == disadvantaged ~ "Most Disadvantaged",
                              Case == non_disadvantaged ~ "Most Non-Disadvantaged"), 
           Probability = Probability * 100)

probabilities_transit_linear_etr <- predict_subset_standads_ordinal_etr %>%   
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Easy to reach jobs", 
    title = NULL) +
  # coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
  #                  xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Equity, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-etr.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_transit_linear_etr,
       width = 18,
       height = 7,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-etr.jpg"))
```

```{r}
for(caso in unique(predict_subset_ordinal_etr$Case)){
  probabilities_ord_etr <- predict_subset_ordinal_etr %>% 
  filter(Case == caso) %>% 
  mutate(Likert = factor(Likert, levels = Likert_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75) +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Easy to reach jobs", 
    title = str_wrap(caso, width = 80)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Mode, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/ordinal/", caso,"-ordinal-etr.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_ord_etr,
       width = 20,
       height = 8,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", disadvantaged,"-ordinal-etr.jpg"))
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", non_disadvantaged,"-ordinal-etr.jpg"))
```

<!-- ### Declined Employment -->

<!-- "I have had to decline employment opportunities because of my transport situation"  -->

<!-- Just Transit:  -->

<!-- ```{r} -->

<!--   filter(Mode == "Transit",  -->
<!--          Case %in% c(disadvantaged, non_disadvantaged),  -->

<!--                               Case == non_disadvantaged ~ "Most Non-Disadvantaged"),  -->
<!--            Probability = Probability * 100) -->

<!--   ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) + -->

<!-- ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-de.jpg"), -->

<!--     y = "Predicted probability", -->

<!-- ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images, "/ordinal/", caso,"-ordinal-de.jpg"), -->
<!--        plot = probabilities_ord_de, -->

<!--        height = 8, -->
<!--        units = "cm", -->
<!--        dpi = 300) -->
<!-- } -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", disadvantaged,"-ordinal-de.jpg")) -->
<!-- knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/", non_disadvantaged,"-ordinal-de.jpg")) -->
<!-- ``` -->

### Mixing Ordinal Models

```{r}
ordinal_subset <- bind_rows(predict_subset_standads_ordinal_fj, predict_subset_standads_ordinal_etr) %>% 
  mutate(Outcome = case_when(Outcome == "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal" ~ "Few jobs accessible", 
                   Outcome == "Easy to reach - Ordinal" ~ "Easy to reach"))

probabilities_ordinal_equity <- ordinal_subset %>%   
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Perception Group", 
    title = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
                   xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~ Outcome + Equity, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(legend.position = "right",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-both.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_ordinal_equity,
       width = 17,
       height = 14,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-both.jpg"))
```

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_dis <- ordinal_subset %>% 
  filter(Equity == "Most Disadvantaged") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Predicted probability: Most Disadvantaged",
    color = "Perception Group", 
    title = NULL) +
  # coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
  #                  xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Outcome, ncol = 3)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "horizontal",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-dis.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_ordinal_dis,
       width = 17,
       height = 9,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-dis.jpg"))
```

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_ndis <- ordinal_subset %>% 
  filter(Equity == "Most Non-Disadvantaged") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Predicted probability: Most Non-Disadvantaged",
    color = "Perception Group", 
    title = NULL) +
  # coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
  #                  xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Outcome, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "horizontal",       
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-ndis.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_ordinal_ndis,
       width = 17,
       height = 10,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/ordinal/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-ndis.jpg"))
```

# Key Thresholds

Identifying key thresholds for transit accessibility: 
```{r}
##################################
##################################

outcome <- "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal" 
"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time"

##################################
##################################

standard_fj <- predict_subset %>%
  filter(Mode == "Transit",
         Outcome == outcome) %>%  
  mutate(Probability = Probability * 100) %>% 
  filter(Case == disadvantaged) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Value, Probability, Likert) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = Likert, values_from = Probability)

fj_threshold <-  standard_fj %>% 
  filter((`Positive` + `Most Positive` + `Neutral`) > (`Negative` + `Most Negative`)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1) %>%
  pull(Value)

fj_threshold
```

```{r}
## Most disadvantaged case
LongTermConditions_dis <- "Yes" 
Woman_or_genderdiverse_dis <- "Yes"
Indigenous_or_racialized_dis <- "Yes"
CarNumber_dis <- 0
BikeNumber_dis <- 0
hh_income_dis <- "$60,000 to $90,000"
hh_size_dis <- 2
Temporary_or_refugee_dis <- "No"
Age_dis <- 35
Match_mode_dis <- "No"

disadvantaged_b <- paste0("LongTermConditions: ", LongTermConditions_dis ," - Woman_or_genderdiverse: ", Woman_or_genderdiverse_dis ," - Indigenous_or_racialized: ", Indigenous_or_racialized_dis ," - CarNumber: ", CarNumber_dis ," - BikeNumber: ", BikeNumber_dis ," - hh_income: ", hh_income_dis ," - hh_size: ",  hh_size_dis," - Temporary_or_refugee: ", Temporary_or_refugee_dis ," - Age: ", Age_dis," - Match_mode: ", Match_mode_dis ) 

##################################
##################################

outcome <- "Few jobs accessible - Ordinal" 
"There are too few jobs available for me in my ideal commuting time"

##################################
##################################

standard_fj <- predict_subset %>%
  filter(Mode == "Transit",
         Outcome == outcome) %>%  
  mutate(Probability = Probability * 100) %>% 
  filter(Case == disadvantaged_b) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Value, Probability, Likert) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = Likert, values_from = Probability) %>%
  mutate(at_least_neutral = `Positive` + `Most Positive` + `Neutral`)

fj_threshold <-  standard_fj %>% 
  filter((`Positive` + `Most Positive` + `Neutral`) > (`Negative` + `Most Negative`)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1) %>%
  pull(Value)

fj_threshold
```

```{r}
##################################
##################################

outcome <- "Easy to reach - Ordinal" 
"With the transport options available to me, I can easily participate/reach the following destinations:” Work" 
##################################
##################################

standard_etr <- predict_subset %>%
  filter(Mode == "Transit",
         Outcome == outcome) %>%  
  mutate(Probability = Probability * 100) %>% 
  filter(Case == disadvantaged) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Value, Probability, Likert) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = Likert, values_from = Probability)

etr_treshold <-  standard_etr %>% 
  filter((`Positive` + `Most Positive` + `Neutral`) >= (`Negative` + `Most Negative`)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1) %>%
  pull(Value)

etr_treshold
```

```{r}
conservative_threshold <- min(fj_threshold, etr_treshold)
progressive_threshold <- max(fj_threshold, etr_treshold)
intermediate_threshold <- (progressive_threshold - conservative_threshold)/2 + conservative_threshold
#intermediate_threshold <- median(fj_threshold, de_threshold, etr_treshold)

# --- standards ---
conservative_threshold
intermediate_threshold
progressive_threshold

type <- c("Conservative", "Intermediate", "Progressive")
threshold_values <- c(conservative_threshold, intermediate_threshold, progressive_threshold)

standards_df <- data.frame(Values = threshold_values)
```

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_dis_thresholds <- ordinal_subset %>% 
  filter(Equity == "Most Disadvantaged") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  geom_vline(data = standards_df,
             aes(xintercept = Values),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = conservative_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Conservative: ", conservative_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = intermediate_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Intermediate: ", intermediate_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = progressive_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Progressive: ", progressive_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3.2, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Probabilities: Most Disadvantaged",
    color = "Perception Group", 
    title = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
                   xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Outcome, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-dis-standards.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_ordinal_dis_thresholds,
       width = 20,
       height = 9,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-dis-standards.jpg"))
```

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_ndis_thresholds <- ordinal_subset %>% 
  filter(Equity == "Most Non-Disadvantaged") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = Inf, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  geom_vline(data = standards_df,
             aes(xintercept = Values),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = conservative_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Conservative: ", conservative_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = intermediate_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Intermediate: ", intermediate_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = progressive_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Progressive: ", progressive_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3.2, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Probabilities: Most Non-Disadvantaged",
    color = "Perception Group", 
    title = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
                   xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Outcome, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-ndis-standards.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_ordinal_ndis_thresholds,
       width = 20,
       height = 9,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-ndis-standards.jpg"))
```

Probabilities + Standards + Area Plots: 

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_dis_thresholds_area <- ordinal_subset %>% 
  filter(Equity == "Most Disadvantaged") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability,  fill = Likert, color = Likert)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.35, position = "stack", linewidth = 0) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  geom_vline(data = standards_df,
             aes(xintercept = Values),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = conservative_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0(conservative_threshold), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, 
           size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = intermediate_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0(intermediate_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = progressive_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0(progressive_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Probabilities: Most Disadvantaged",
       color = "Perception Group", 
       fill = "Perception Group",
    title = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
                   xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Outcome, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-dis-standards-area.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_ordinal_dis_thresholds_area,
       width = 20,
       height = 9,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-dis-standards-area.jpg"))
```

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_ndis_thresholds_areas <- ordinal_subset %>% 
  filter(Equity == "Most Non-Disadvantaged") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability,  fill = Likert, color = Likert)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.35, position = "stack", linewidth = 0) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  geom_vline(data = standards_df,
             aes(xintercept = Values),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = conservative_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0(conservative_threshold), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, 
           size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = intermediate_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0(intermediate_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = progressive_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0(progressive_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Probabilities: Most Non-Disadvantaged",
       color = "Perception Group", 
       fill = "Perception Group",
    title = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(#ylim = c(0, 100),
                   xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Outcome, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-ndis-standards-areas.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_ordinal_ndis_thresholds_areas,
       width = 20,
       height = 9,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-ndis-standards-areas.jpg"))
```

```{r}
probabilities_ordinal_equity_threshold_area <- ordinal_subset %>%   
  ggplot(aes(x = Value, y = Probability, color = Likert, fill = Likert)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.35, position = "stack", linewidth = 0) +
  geom_vline(data = accessibility_lines,
             aes(xintercept = Value),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = median_sa, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Median: ", round(median_sa)), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  annotate("text", x = max_sa, y = 60, 
           label = paste0("Max: ", round(max_sa)), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8, color = "#333333") +
  geom_vline(data = standards_df,
             aes(xintercept = Values),
             linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.3, color = "#666666") +
  annotate("text", x = conservative_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0(conservative_threshold), 
           angle = 90, 
           hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, 
           size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = intermediate_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0(intermediate_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
    annotate("text", x = progressive_threshold, y = 60, 
           label = paste0(progressive_threshold), 
           angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
  
  labs(x = "Number of jobs reached by public transit",
    y = "Predicted probability",
    color = "Perception Group", 
    fill = "Perception Group",
    title = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100),
                   xlim = c(0, 1.10 * max_sa )) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~Equity + Outcome, ncol = 2)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors_likert) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors_likert) + 
  theme(#legend.position = "bottom",         
    legend.direction = "vertical",    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave(file = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-both-area.jpg"),
       plot = probabilities_ordinal_equity_threshold_area,
       width = 18,
       height = 14,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/accessibility-effect-transit-ordinals-both-area.jpg"))
```

## Maps 

Identifying priority areas based on their transit accessibility gap: 

```{r}
priority_geo_areas <- census_tracts %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  left_join(accessibilities_wide, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(SA_pp_Transit)) %>% 
  group_by(CTUID) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(SA_pp_Transit = first(SA_pp_Transit, na_rm = TRUE),
               Weighted_Pop = Population) %>% 
  mutate(range_cons = conservative_threshold - SA_pp_Transit, 
         range_prog = progressive_threshold - SA_pp_Transit, 
         range_inte = intermediate_threshold - SA_pp_Transit, 
         AFI_cons = range_cons * Weighted_Pop, 
         AFI_prog = range_prog * Weighted_Pop, 
         AFI_inte = range_inte * Weighted_Pop)

# Conservative threshold 
cons_classification <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  filter(range_cons > 0)

q2  <- quantile(cons_classification$AFI_cons, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)   
q50 <- quantile(cons_classification$AFI_cons, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)   
q75 <- quantile(cons_classification$AFI_cons, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) 

cons_classification <- cons_classification %>% 
  mutate(priority_cons = case_when(AFI_cons > q75 ~ "Very-high priority",
                              AFI_cons > q50 & AFI_cons <= q75 ~ "High priority",
                              AFI_cons > q2  & AFI_cons <= q50 ~ "Moderate priority",
                              AFI_cons <= q2 ~ "Low priority", 
                              TRUE ~ "No deficit")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(CTUID, priority_cons)

# Progressive threshold 

prog_classification <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  filter(range_prog > 0)

q2  <- quantile(prog_classification$AFI_prog, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)   
q50 <- quantile(prog_classification$AFI_prog, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)   
q75 <- quantile(prog_classification$AFI_prog, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) 

prog_classification <- prog_classification %>% 
  mutate(priority_prog = case_when(AFI_prog > q75 ~ "Very-high priority",
                              AFI_prog > q50 & AFI_prog <= q75 ~ "High priority",
                              AFI_prog > q2  & AFI_prog <= q50 ~ "Moderate priority",
                              AFI_prog <= q2 ~ "Low priority", 
                              TRUE ~ "No deficit")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(CTUID, priority_prog)

# Intermediate threshold 

inte_classification <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  filter(range_inte > 0)

q2  <- quantile(inte_classification$AFI_inte, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)   
q50 <- quantile(inte_classification$AFI_inte, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)   
q75 <- quantile(inte_classification$AFI_inte, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) 

inte_classification <- inte_classification %>% 
  mutate(priority_inte = case_when(AFI_inte > q75 ~ "Very-high priority",
                              AFI_inte > q50 & AFI_inte <= q75 ~ "High priority",
                              AFI_inte > q2  & AFI_inte <= q50 ~ "Moderate priority",
                              AFI_inte <= q2 ~ "Low priority", 
                              TRUE ~ "No deficit")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(CTUID, priority_inte)


priority_geo_areas <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  left_join(cons_classification, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  left_join(prog_classification, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  left_join(inte_classification, by = "CTUID")
```

Calculating FGT measures:

```{r}
fgt_equity <- function(df, threshold) {
  N <- df %>% 
    dplyr::summarize(Weighted_Pop = sum(Weighted_Pop, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  headcount <-
    df %>%
    filter(SA_pp_Transit <= threshold) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(fgt0_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop),
              Unweighted = n(), 
              fgt1_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)),
              fgt2_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)^2))

    fg <- mutate(headcount,
               Weighted_Pop = N$Weighted_Pop, 
               fgt0 = fgt0_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
               fgt1 = fgt1_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
               fgt2 = fgt2_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
               quant = threshold)
}

fgt_equity_intermediate <- fgt_equity(df = priority_geo_areas, 
                        threshold = intermediate_threshold) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(priority = "General", Threshold = "Intermediate")

fgt_equity_conservative <- fgt_equity(df = priority_geo_areas, 
                               threshold = conservative_threshold) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(priority = "General", Threshold = "Conservative")

fgt_equity_progressive <- fgt_conservative <- fgt_equity(df = priority_geo_areas, 
                                                  threshold = progressive_threshold) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(priority = "General", Threshold = "Progressive")

fgt_priorities <- function(df, threshold, priority) {
  N <- df %>% 
    dplyr::summarize(Weighted_Pop = sum(Weighted_Pop, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  headcount <- df %>%
    filter(SA_pp_Transit <= threshold) %>%
    group_by(.data[[priority]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(fgt0_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop),
                            Unweighted = n(), 
      fgt1_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)),
      fgt2_toSum = sum(Weighted_Pop * ((threshold - SA_pp_Transit)/threshold)^2),
      .groups = "drop")
  
  fg <- headcount %>% 
    mutate(Weighted_Pop = N$Weighted_Pop, 
      fgt0 = fgt0_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
      fgt1 = fgt1_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
      fgt2 = fgt2_toSum / Weighted_Pop,
      quant = threshold)
  
  return(fg)
}

fgt_prior_intermediate <- fgt_priorities(
  df = priority_geo_areas,
  threshold = intermediate_threshold,
  priority = "priority_inte") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename(priority = priority_inte) %>% 
  mutate(Threshold = "Intermediate")
  
fgt_prior_conservative <- fgt_priorities(
  df = priority_geo_areas,
  threshold = conservative_threshold,
  priority = "priority_cons") %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename(priority = priority_cons) %>% 
  mutate(Threshold = "Conservative")

fgt_prior_progressive <- fgt_priorities(
  df = priority_geo_areas,
  threshold = progressive_threshold,
  priority = "priority_prog") %>% 
  rename(priority = priority_prog) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  mutate(Threshold = "Progressive")

fgt_measures <- bind_rows(fgt_equity_intermediate, fgt_equity_conservative, fgt_equity_progressive,
                           fgt_prior_intermediate, fgt_prior_conservative, fgt_prior_progressive) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(priority)) 
```

Plotting graphs of FGT measures: 

```{r}
plot_fgt_data <-  fgt_measures %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(fgt0, fgt1, fgt2)) %>%
  mutate(name = ifelse(name == "fgt0", "FGT-0",
                ifelse(name == "fgt1", "FGT-1", "FGT-2")), 
         pop = "Population")

priority_order <- c("General", 
                   "Very-high priority", 
                   "High priority", 
                   "Moderate priority", 
                   "Low priority")

my_colors <- c("#525252","#e31a1c","#fd8d3c", "#feb24c","#fed976")

names(my_colors) <- priority_order
  
plot_fgt <- plot_fgt_data %>% 
  mutate(priority = factor(priority, levels = priority_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = Threshold, x = value, fill = priority)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.70, pch=21, colour = "black")  + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  facet_wrap(~ name) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  xlab(NULL) + 
  ylab(NULL) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

ggplot2::ggsave(plot = plot_fgt, 
          filename = paste0(diretorio_export_images,"FGT_plots.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 5, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/FGT_plots.jpg"))
```

Plotting priority areas for each standard: 

```{r}
priority_geo_areas <- priority_geo_areas %>%
   mutate(priority_cons = replace_na(priority_cons, "No deficit"),
          priority_prog = replace_na(priority_prog, "No deficit"),
          priority_inte = replace_na(priority_inte, "No deficit"))

priority_geo_areas_long_a <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("AFI_cons", "AFI_prog", "AFI_inte"),
               names_to = c("AFI_type"), 
               values_to  ="AFI_value") %>%
  mutate(AFI_type = case_when(AFI_type == 'AFI_cons' ~ "Conservative", 
                   AFI_type == 'AFI_prog' ~ "Progressive", 
                   AFI_type == 'AFI_inte' ~ "Intermediate")) %>%
    dplyr::select("CTUID","AFI_type", "AFI_value")

  
priority_geo_areas_long_b <- priority_geo_areas %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("priority_cons", "priority_prog", "priority_inte"),
               names_to = c("Priority_type"), 
               values_to  = "Priority_value") %>%
  mutate(Priority_type = case_when(Priority_type == 'priority_cons' ~ "Conservative", 
                   Priority_type == 'priority_prog' ~ "Progressive", 
                   Priority_type == 'priority_inte' ~ "Intermediate")) %>% 
      dplyr::select("CTUID","Priority_type", "Priority_value")


priority_geo_areas_long <- priority_geo_areas_long_a %>% 
  left_join(priority_geo_areas_long_b, 
            by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID", 
                   "AFI_type" = "Priority_type")) %>% 
  distinct(CTUID, AFI_type, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  full_join(census_tracts, by = c("CTUID" = "CTUID"))


priority_order <- c("Very-high priority", 
                   "High priority", 
                   "Moderate priority", 
                   "Low priority")

my_colors <- c("#e31a1c","#fd8d3c", "#feb24c","#fed976")

names(my_colors) <- priority_order
  
priority_geo_areas_long <- priority_geo_areas_long %>% 
  mutate(Priority_value = factor(Priority_value, levels = priority_order), 
                  pcd_label = case_when(PCD == "3518" ~ "Durham", 
                               PCD == "3519" ~ "York", 
                               PCD == "3520" ~ "Toronto", 
                               PCD == "3521" ~ "Peel", 
                               PCD == "3524" ~ "Halton", 
                               PCD == "3525" ~ "Hamilton")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AFI_type)) %>% 
  st_as_sf(crs = st_crs(census_tracts)) %>%
  mutate(facet_title =
           case_when(AFI_type == "Conservative" ~ paste0(AFI_type, ": ", conservative_threshold), 
                     AFI_type == "Intermediate" ~ paste0(AFI_type, ": ", intermediate_threshold), 
                     AFI_type == "Progressive" ~ paste0(AFI_type, ": ", progressive_threshold)))


priority_plot <- tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = "Priority Level") +
  tm_facets(by = "facet_title",
    drop.empty.facets = TRUE,
    ncol = 3) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(priority_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities.jpg"), 
          width = 17, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities.jpg"))
```


```{r}
conservative_threshold_plot <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>% 
  tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Conservative Threshold: ", conservative_threshold)) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(conservative_threshold_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_conservative.jpg"), 
          width = 14, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_conservative.jpg"))
```

```{r}
conservative_threshold_pcd <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Conservative") %>% 
  tm_shape(.) + 
  tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Conservative Threshold: ", conservative_threshold)) + 
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75)  +
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(conservative_threshold_pcd, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_conservative_pcd.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_conservative_pcd.jpg"))
```

```{r}
intermediate_threshold_plot <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Intermediate") %>% 
  tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Intermediate Threshold: ", intermediate_threshold)) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(intermediate_threshold_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_intermediate.jpg"), 
          width = 14, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_intermediate.jpg"))
```

```{r}
intermediate_threshold_pcd <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Intermediate") %>% 
  tm_shape(.) + 
  tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Intermediate Threshold: ", intermediate_threshold)) + 
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75)  +
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(intermediate_threshold_pcd, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_intermediate_pcd.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_intermediate_pcd.jpg"))
```


```{r}
progressive_threshold_plot <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Progressive") %>% 
  tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Progressive Threshold: ", progressive_threshold)) + 
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 10, 15, 25)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 1) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(progressive_threshold_plot, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_progressive.jpg"), 
          width = 14, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_progressive.jpg"))
```

```{r}
progressive_threshold_pcd <- priority_geo_areas_long %>%
  filter(AFI_type == "Progressive") %>% 
  tm_shape(.) + 
  tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = paste0("Progressive Threshold: ", progressive_threshold)) + 
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75)  +
  tm_facets(by = "pcd_label", drop.empty.facets = TRUE, ncol = 3, free.coords = TRUE) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(progressive_threshold_pcd, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_progressive_pcd.jpg"), 
          width = 18, 
          height= 12, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_progressive_pcd.jpg"))
```

```{r}
priority_plot_3520 <- tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long %>% filter(PCD == 3520)) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = "Priority Level") +
  tm_facets(by = "facet_title",
    drop.empty.facets = TRUE,
    ncol = 3) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2.5, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(priority_plot_3520, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_3520.jpg"), 
          width = 17, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_3520.jpg"))
```

```{r}
priority_plot_3525 <- tm_shape(priority_geo_areas_long %>% filter(PCD == 3525)) +
    tm_polygons("Priority_value",
            palette = my_colors,
            style = "cat",
            border.col = NULL,
            textNA = "No deficit",
            title = "Priority Level") +
  tm_facets(by = "facet_title",
    drop.empty.facets = TRUE,
    ncol = 3) +
  tm_shape(census_divisions) +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 0.75) +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("right", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 2.5, 5)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "top"), size = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = c("right"))

tmap_save(priority_plot_3525, 
          paste0(diretorio_export_images,"geographical_priorities_3525.jpg"), 
          width = 17, 
          height= 10, 
          units = "cm", 
          dpi = 500)

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(diretorio_export_images,"/geographical_priorities_3525.jpg"))
```

# Saving model files 

```{r}
saveRDS(TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"travel_too_long.rds"))
saveRDS(EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"easy_to_reach.rds"))
saveRDS(DeclineEmployment_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"decline_employments.rds"))
saveRDS(FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean, paste0(diretorio_export,"few_jobs.rds"))
saveRDS(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes, paste0(diretorio_export,"few_jobs_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(EasyToGo_ordinal_3modes, paste0(diretorio_export,"easy_to_reach_ordinal.rds"))
saveRDS(predict_subset, paste0(diretorio_export,"predictions.rds"))
```

```{r}
fgt_measures <- fgt_measures %>% 
  dplyr::select("priority", "Threshold", "quant", "Weighted_Pop", "fgt0_toSum", "fgt1_toSum", "fgt2_toSum", 
                "Weighted_Pop", "fgt0", "fgt1", "fgt2", "Unweighted")

write.csv(fgt_measures, paste0(diretorio_export, "fgt_measures.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
write.csv(priority_geo_areas, paste0(diretorio_export, "priority_geo_areas.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```


```{r}
 census_tracts_export <- census_tracts %>% 
  left_join(priority_geo_areas, by = "CTUID") %>% 
  mutate(Conservative = conservative_threshold, 
         Intermediate = intermediate_threshold,
         Progressive = progressive_threshold)

sf::st_write(census_tracts_export, paste0(diretorio_export, "census_tract_with_priorities.gpkg"), append = FALSE)
```


```{r}
ttl_linear <- broom::tidy(TravelTooLong_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean)
names(ttl_linear) <- paste0(names(ttl_linear), "_ttl")

etr_linear <- broom::tidy(EasyToGo_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean)
names(etr_linear) <- paste0(names(etr_linear), "_etr")

de_linear <- broom::tidy(DeclineEmployment_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean)
names(de_linear) <- paste0(names(de_linear), "_de")

fj_linear <- broom::tidy(FewJobs_3mode_lm_SA_pp_clean)
names(fj_linear) <- paste0(names(fj_linear), "_fj")

linear_models <- cbind(ttl_linear, etr_linear, de_linear, fj_linear)
```

```{r}
write.csv(linear_models, paste0(diretorio_export, "linear_models.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
etr_ordinal <- broom::tidy(EasyToGo_ordinal_3modes)
names(etr_ordinal) <- paste0(names(etr_ordinal), "_etr")

fj_ordinal <- broom::tidy(FewJobs_ordinal_3modes)
names(fj_ordinal) <- paste0(names(fj_ordinal), "_fj")

ordinal_models <- cbind(etr_ordinal, fj_ordinal)
```

```{r}
write.csv(ordinal_models, paste0(diretorio_export, "ordinal_models.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```
